headline: Motorola Solutions Inc (NYSE:MSI) Q1 Earnings Beat and Guidance Raise Tempered by Slight Revenue Miss
summary: Motorola Solutions beat Q1 EPS estimates at $3.37 but narrowly missed revenue forecasts. Stock dipped 1.2% after-hours as strong software growth and a record $15.7B backlog offset a slight top-line miss.

headline: CoreWeave’s Stunning Rally Creates Prove-It Moment for Earnings
summary: (Bloomberg) -- CoreWeave Inc. shares are on a scorching run in 2026 as demand for computing capacity to power artificial intelligence keeps growing. But now investors want to see some proof that the neo-cloud provider is executing on its ambitious plans. headline: Is It Time To Reassess Motorola Solutions (MSI) After Public Safety Demand-Fueled Rally?
summary: How has Motorola Solutions stock been performing? Motorola Solutions might be on your radar if you are wondering whether a US$433.66 share price accurately reflects what you are getting for your money. Over the short term, the stock shows mixed performance, with a 1.0% return over the last 7 days and a 1.8% decline over the last 30 days. Year to date it sits at 13.8% and the 1 year and 5 year returns are 5.6% and 136.8% respectively. These moves have kept longer term holders interested,...
